test.name: CT-00 - Validação visualizar página inicial

kw.name: Abrir Sessao
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.msg: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.159) Stacktrace: #0 0x558f1c5eab6a <unknown> #1 0x558f1bffda32 <unknown> #2 0x558f1bfe43db <unknown> #3 0x558f1bfe2906 <unknown> #4 0x558f1bfe30bf <unknown> #5 0x558f1c012e9e <unknown> #6 0x558f1c006f01 <unknown> #7 0x558f1c006df2 <unknown> #8 0x558f1bfd41ff <unknown> #9 0x558f1bfd260d <unknown> #10 0x558f1c0b0862 <unknown> #11 0x558f1c09b369 <unknown> #12 0x558f1c044c0f <unknown> #13 0x558f1c0459d1 <unknown> #14 0x558f1c5af6b9 <unknown> #15 0x558f1c5b25c1 <unknown> #16 0x558f1c59be29 <unknown> #17 0x558f1c5b317e <unknown> #18 0x558f1c5824b0 <unknown> #19 0x558f1c5d7578 <unknown> #20 0x558f1c5d774b <unknown> #21 0x558f1c5e91a3 <unknown> #22 0x7fa8f6e9caa4 <unknown> #23 0x7fa8f6f29c6c <unknown>

kw.doc: Abre o navegador na URL e maximiza a tela.

kw.name: Fechar Sessao
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Tira uma evidência e fecha o navegador ao final do teste.

test.status: Setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.159) Stacktrace: #0 0x558f1c5eab6a <unknown> #1 0x558f1bffda32 <unknown> #2 0x558f1bfe43db <unknown> #3 0x558f1bfe2906 <unknown> #4 0x558f1bfe30bf <unknown> #5 0x558f1c012e9e <unknown> #6 0x558f1c006f01 <unknown> #7 0x558f1c006df2 <unknown> #8 0x558f1bfd41ff <unknown> #9 0x558f1bfd260d <unknown> #10 0x558f1c0b0862 <unknown> #11 0x558f1c09b369 <unknown> #12 0x558f1c044c0f <unknown> #13 0x558f1c0459d1 <unknown> #14 0x558f1c5af6b9 <unknown> #15 0x558f1c5b25c1 <unknown> #16 0x558f1c59be29 <unknown> #17 0x558f1c5b317e <unknown> #18 0x558f1c5824b0 <unknown> #19 0x558f1c5d7578 <unknown> #20 0x558f1c5d774b <unknown> #21 0x558f1c5e91a3 <unknown> #22 0x7fa8f6e9caa4 <unknown> #23 0x7fa8f6f29c6c <unknown>
